content.en: Narrator: It is 2026! Happy New Year! Crowd: Happy New Year!!
content.tw: Narrator: 現在是 2026 年！新年快樂喔！

content.en: Every New Year, many people try to do something for one year. They want to make a good change in their lives. Do you want to try this? Here are some ideas!
content.tw: 每到新的一年，都會有很多人許下新年新希望。為了讓生活變得更好，他們會訂下一個目標，並且持續執行一整年。你也想試試看嗎？

content.en: You can try to be healthier. How? Eat more fruits and vegetables every day! Or drink more water every day!
content.tw: 你可以試著變得更健康！你可以每天多吃一點蔬菜水果，或是多喝一點水！

content.en: Or play a sport you like every week. Or play a new sport! Join a team, make new friends, and feel great!
content.tw: 你也可以每星期都做你喜歡的運動，或是學一種新運動，加入球隊，認識新朋友。這樣不僅可以讓身體更健康，心情也會變好！

content.en: You can be neater. How? Make your bed every morning. Or give your old toys and clothes to kids who need them.
content.tw: 你還可以變得更乾淨整齊。例如每天早上折被子，或是把不用的玩具和衣服送給需要的小朋友。

content.en: You can help the Earth. How? Use less plastic. Or get a plant! Water it and watch it grow!
content.tw: 幫助地球也不錯喔！少用一點塑膠，或是種一盆植物，看著它長大。

content.en: There are other things you can do. Read one book every month! Or write what you think and feel in a notebook. Or try a fun hobby!
content.tw: 還有很多別的新年新希望，像是每個月讀一本書，寫寫日記記錄你的想法跟感受，或者培養新的興趣！

content.en: Try something that will make a good change in your life. Do it a lot in 2026! You will feel good and have a happier year!
content.tw: 試著做些能讓你的生活有良好改變的事吧。在2026年多多努力實踐！你會感覺良好並擁有更快樂的一年！

vocabulary.preface: 新的一年來臨，你可以決心做很多新的事。

content.text:
1. want 想要.
What's your New Year's resolution, Nancy? 你的新年決心是什麼，南西?
I want to learn how to say "thank you" in 10 languages!

2. join 加入.
And I'll join a group of hot pot eaters!
That sounds…not so healthy.

3. every month 每個月.
Oh, we'll only get together once every month, I think.
What about you? 你呢?

4. change 改變.
I'll make a good change in my life.
By doing what…?
By feeling great about me!

vocabulary.postscript: 新年你想做什麼呢? want想要 join加入 every month每個月 change改變

quiz.question: 1. How can you try to be healthier this year?
2. How can you be neater this year?
3. How can you help the Earth?

title: Power Bank Fire Safety from Experts

content.en: Many people use their phones a lot. They use them all day. Sometimes their phones need more power.
content.tw: 很多人一整天都在滑手機，所以他們的手機需要時常充電！

content.en: So some people use power banks. Power banks give their phones power. But sometimes power banks catch on fire!
content.tw: 有一些人會用行動電源幫手機充電。但行動電源有時候會起火，造成危險。

content.en: Be careful when a power bank is very hot. Be very careful when it has smoke or a burning smell. Do not touch the power bank! Find a grownup fast! Your mom, your dad, or a teacher!
content.tw: 行動電源假如變得很燙，就要提高警覺。要是有冒煙或燒焦的氣味，就更要小心喔！這個時候千萬不要去碰行動電源！應該要馬上告訴大人，像是爸爸、媽媽或老師。

content.en: But maybe the grownup does not know what to do! Tell them what experts say. They say do not use a fire extinguisher. It will make more smoke!
content.tw: 如果大人也不知道該怎麼辦，你可以告訴他們專家的建議。專家說不要用滅火器，因為這樣會讓行動電源產生更多煙。

content.en: Experts say to take a smoking or burning power bank outside fast! Then put it into water. The water will bubble. Experts say to keep the power bank in the water for a week. Wait for no more bubbles.
content.tw: 專家說要趕快把冒煙或起火的行動電源拿到室外，然後泡進水裡。之後，水會開始冒泡。專家說要把行動電源泡在水裡一個星期，或是到完全沒有泡泡為止。

content.en: Then experts say to give the burned power bank to a sanitation worker. The worker can safely throw it away.
content.tw: 最後，要把燒壞的行動電源交給清潔隊，讓他們安全的處理掉！

content.en: Power banks are helpful. But when a power bank has smoke or a burning smell, tell a grownup fast!
content.tw: 行動電源很方便。但是當行動電源冒煙或有燒焦味時，要趕快告訴大人！

vocabulary.preface: 行動電源用起來很方便，卻有起火燃燒的風險。

content.text:
1. fire 火。
Hi, it’s Nancy. I’m going to be late. 嗨，我是南西，我會遲到。
Did something happen? 出了什麼事嗎?
Yeah, our train stopped because of a fire. 對，我們的火車停了，因為火災。

2. power 電力。
A fire? Are you okay? 火災? 你還好嗎?
I’m fine. 我很好。
But they’ve cut off the power so we’re stuck here.
但是他們切斷了電源，所以我們卡在這裡。

3. burn 燃燒。
Oh my god! Is the train still burning? 天哪，火車還在燒嗎?
No no, just smoke. 只有冒煙。

4. careful 小心的。
We’re all safe. 我們都很安全。
Good. Now you be careful, okay? 很好，你要小心喔。
Okay. Bye.

vocabulary.postscript:
來一起複習今天的單字。
fire火 power電力 burn燃燒 careful小心的

quiz.question: 1. Where do experts say to take a smoking power bank?
2. What do experts say to use for a smoking power bank?
3. What can a sanitation worker do with a burned power bank?

content.en: Taiwan has many Indigenous groups. Keeping their ways of life is important for Taiwan.
content.tw: 台灣有很多原住民，保留他們的生活方式很重要。

content.en: Now, about ninety schools are working with local Indigenous groups. They want kids to understand Indigenous ways of life.
content.tw: 目前大約九十所學校跟當地原住民族合作，希望讓小朋友更了解他們。

content.en: These schools have Indigenous houses with Indigenous art, tools, and stories. Kids learn by doing.
content.tw: 這些學校有原住民的傳統房子，裡面有各種手工藝、工具和故事。小朋友可以親身體驗原住民文化。

content.en: Taoyuan's Guanghua Elementary School has Atayal houses. Atayal people helped build them. Kids learn Atayal ways.
content.tw: 桃園的光華國小有泰雅族的房子，讓小朋友們在那裡學習泰雅族的生活方式。這些房子是泰雅族人一起幫忙蓋的。

content.en: Hualien's Taiping Elementary School has a Bunun stone house. The school used Bunun ways to build it. Kids learn Bunun ways.
content.tw: 花蓮的太平國小有布農族石板屋，是用傳統方式蓋的，學生可以更了解布農族。

content.en: Hualien's Ruibei Elementary School has a Bunun and Amis house. Bunun and Amis groups built it together. The art, tools, and stories are from both. Kids learn the languages, crafts, songs, and dances of both. Kids see the two groups work together and respect each other.
content.tw: 花蓮的瑞北國小有一棟布農族跟阿美族一起蓋的房子，裡面展示兩族的作品跟其他的東西。小朋友學習他們的語言和文化，也看到不同族群怎麼互相尊重與合作。

content.en: Kids at these schools understand Indigenous ways more now. Does your school have an Indigenous house?
content.tw: 這些學校的孩子現在對原住民文化有了更多的了解。你的學校有原住民傳統屋嗎？

vocabulary.preface: 台灣很多國小教導兒童原住民文化，希望讓它延續。

content.text: 1. understand 了解。Did you understand what she said? 你聽懂她在講什麼嗎?Not at all. 完全不懂。Was she speaking Chinese? 她在講中文嗎?I believe so. 我想是。
2. language 語言。I thought it’s another language. 我還以為是在講另外一種話。Yeah, Chinese can be hard. 對啊，中文是滿難的。
3. way of life 生活方式。I think when learning a new language, 我覺得學一種新語言,you need to learn their way of life. 也需要學他們的生活方式。
4. help 幫助。I agree. 我同意。When I was learning Japanese, 我學日文時,I ate raw fish every day. 每天吃生的魚。Did it help? 有幫助嗎?No. 沒有。

vocabulary.postscript: 你想學新的語言嗎? 來讀單字。understand了解 language語言 way of life生活方式 help幫助

quiz.question: 1. Where is the school with Atayal houses?
2. What is the Bunun house made of?
3. What do all of the houses have?
